raw_response_text:
<features>
- The flower has multiple petals.
- The petals are yellow.
- The flower has a central part with visible stamens.
- The flower is part of a cluster of flowers on a stem.
- The background is blurred green foliage and dark areas.
</features>
<kb>
- IF the flower has orange and yellow petals, and a distinct central structure with stamens, THEN the class is 45.
- IF the flower has purple petals with a white and dark center, and prominent yellow stamens, THEN the class is 44.
- IF the flower has pink petals arranged in a radial pattern around a prominent yellow center, and large green leaves, THEN the class is 77.
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image shows a flower with yellow petals. This matches the color description in the rule for class 45, which also mentions orange and yellow petals. While the Target Image only shows yellow, the presence of yellow is a key feature. The flower also has a central structure with visible stamens, consistent with the description for class 45. Classes 44 and 77 are clearly different due to the petal colors (purple and pink respectively) and the overall flower structure. Therefore, the rule for class 45 is best satisfied.
</rule_check>
<response>45</response>

<features>
- The flower has five distinct petals.
- The petals are a vibrant purple color.
- The center of the flower has a white ring surrounding a dark purple area with yellow stamens.
- There are several unopened buds visible, also purple.
- The leaves are green and somewhat elongated.
</features>
<kb>
- IF a flower has five distinct petals, is purple with a white and dark purple center with yellow stamens, and has unopened purple buds, THEN the class is 44.
- IF a flower has multiple orange and yellow petals, THEN the class is 45.
- IF a flower has many pink petals arranged in layers, and a prominent yellow center, THEN the class is 77.
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image shows a flower with five distinct purple petals, a white ring around a dark purple center with yellow stamens, and unopened purple buds. This matches the description for class 44.
</rule_check>
<response>44</response>

- The center of the flower is yellow and appears to be a seed pod structure.
- Large, round green leaves are visible in the background.
</features>
<kb>
- IF the flower has multiple layers of pink petals, a yellow seed pod center, and large round green leaves, THEN the class is 77.
- IF the flower has purple petals with a white and dark center, THEN the class is 44.
- IF the flower has orange and yellow petals with a distinct shape and arrangement, THEN the class is 45.
</kb>
<rule_check>

</rule_check>
<response>77</response>
